ideation: This sequence simulates the action of hitting a field hockey ball. The right arm will hold the stick, while the left arm provides balance and support.  The movement will be a smooth, controlled swing. I will reference the existing examples to ensure fluidity and realism within the robot's two-joint limitations. Frame 1 will show the robot poised to strike, with the right arm back, the stick angled for the shot, and the left arm providing support.  Frame 2 will show the stick making contact with the ball, with the right arm extending forward. Frame 3 shows the follow-through, with the right arm completing its arc, and the left arm adjusting for balance. Frame 4 returns the robot to a neutral position.

frames.beat: robot poised, right arm back for the swing
right arm swings forward, hitting the ball
follow-through with the right arm, left arm balances
arms return to a neutral, ready stance
